QF.id: I Clearing Settlement and Risk Management_46

question.text: The Extreme Loss Margin for USDINR options is calculated on:

answer.text: The notional value based on the latest available FBIL rate for short option positions
The strike price of the option
The contract value of long options

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Options ELM is on notional value of SHORT option positions. Notional = based on latest FBIL rate for INR pairs. Cross-currency ELM is collected in INR using FBIL conversion rates. **The Trap:** ELM for options is on NOTIONAL value (not premium), and only on SHORT positions (not long). **Cross-Exam Context:** Options margin specifics are tested in Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Long option holders have already paid the premium (max risk) — no ELM needed. Short holders face unlimited risk, hence ELM applies.
